string 2: Get on board?
Yes.
{end}No.
You must be surprised... that this is how things turned out.
That's right. This is the former site of Iliad Temple.

Junomon has been acting strangely ever since being separated
from the Great Guardian and having the treasure stolen from her...
But what exactly changed her...? That is what I want to know.
It seems you can't proceed further right now.
It appears we made it in time.
We shall accompany you from here on out.

Warning. There is an escaped Digimon with the ability to transform
on the loose. Be careful when sharing information.
They must be around here somewhere! Find them immediately!
They've gotten ahead of us, somehow. Listen up, kid.

In order to open the cells from the Gamma Device, you have
to operate two other devices somewhere around here, too.

Those two devices are referred to as the Alpha Device
and the Beta Device.

ClavisAngemon is a dangerous opponent. Make sure to
avoid him while we look for those two devices.
That ought to do it. The Beta Device is taken care of.
Now we try and find the Alpha Device!

We should be able to use that Gamma Device now.
Let's return to the east passage and open Minervamon's cell!

Eh? We can get out now! I don't know how it all went down,
but I'll take it!
Lord Titamon! Youse responsible for this?! You're the best!

This facility's more dangerous than ya think. I say we all
follow Lord Titamon's lead!

Yeah, that's probably the safest bet. Okay, everybody
follow Lord Titamon!
There... That unlocked the Alpha Device.
Now, let's find the Beta Device!

We should be able to use that Gamma Device now.
Let's return to the east passage and open Minervamon's cell!
Phew, I thought I was done for! Ah, Lord Titamon...
Oh, it's you, Witchmon! I'm glad to see you're safe, but...

...we're totally trapped in here. Looks like we'll need to
find a way out.
I'll follow wherever you lead, Lord Titamon!

Hey! What's this all about?! How're we supposed to get
outta here now?!
This ain't good! Not good at all! We've reached a dead end!

Forget about that, will ya? What's this? It looks like some
kinda switch or somethin'!
We've gotta find a way out of here, and fast!

Tell me somethin' I don't know! If it was that easy, we
would've already found it by now!
Shut yer trap for a sec, okay? There's a switch over here!
Don't ya dare flip that switch.
This is no joke. Don't flip it, no matter what!

We ain't stupid, ya know. Nothin' ever goes yer way when
ya flip these things!

So yer sayin' it's a trap? Hehe. We're too smart to fall for
that. There's no way I'm flippin' it!

There you are! Now, surrender quietly if you know what's
good for you!
U-Uh-oh! This ain't good!
What're we gonna do now?!
L-Lord Titamon!

We don't stand a chance in a full-on battle! Retreat!
Run for your lives!
Run and don't look back!
Dwaaaaah!
Daaaaah! Ogremon!

Damn it! I can't just leave 'em behind...! Lord Titamon,
get yerself to safety!
Hey, wait! Urk... Okay, we'll meet up later!
Let's go, kid!
H-He's here...!
Wait... Witchmon! Put that sucker to sleep!
Umm... Let's see...
Idle Bubble!
Nice work!
*yawn* ...Whoops!
Whaaat?!
Hit him with your spell again!
Idle Bubble!
...Huh? What just happened...?
I knew it! It wears off almost immediately!
I see... So you are the ones behind this!
Looks like we don't have any other choice but to flee!
You are not getting away from me that easily!
Witchmon! Now!
Idle Bubble!
Now, prepare to meet your end!
Huh?!
You lot again!
*mumble* Where am I...? Is this home?
Huh?! YOU'RE GOING TO PAY FOR THAT!!
*mumble* I do not think I can eat all this...
Huh?! THAT'S IT, I'VE HAD ENOUGH!!
Oh! Here he comes! Th-Th-This ain't lookin' good for us!

Ain't no way there's just one of 'em! Exactly how many of
'em are there?!
There is no escaping me! It ends here and now for all of you!
See?! He's even here, too!
Don't worry! We can put him to sleep! Witchmon, do your thing!
Understood! Idle Bubble!
Oops... I need more power.
You shall pay for humiliating me like this!
Yikes! Now we really made it angry!
We can't go this way! He'll find us for sure!
Let's go, kid!
All right, kid. The Beta Device is nearby. Take care of it first.
It looks like it doesn't open from here.

This must be the switch to turn off the security system.
It's locked and can't be used right now, though.

This must be the switch to open the cells. It's locked and
can't be used right now, though.

The wall is weak right here. You could probably break it
down with the help of a Digimon.
The wall is weak right here.
The huge Digimon is fast asleep.

An unfathomably evil presence can be detected here. It'd be
best to keep some distance for now.

Warning! Warning! There has been an escape from the
Titans' prison ward!
Titamon, SkullBaluchimon, and some other Titans have escaped!

We are locking down the facility. If you come across the
fugitives, apprehend them immediately!
Come on, now! Ya ready to talk?
That ain't gonna work on us...
Spit it out, already! Where is Lord Titamon?!

Ugh! How many times must I say this?
I'm right in front of— Ouch!
We ain't got time to play around. If ya don't know, just say so.
Hey, you guys... That's actually Lord Titamon...
Eh? Oh, hey there, Witchmon! We're searchin' for Lord Titamon.
...Wait. Whaaat?!
We messed up big time... What do we do now?
P-Please forgive us!
O-Ogremon told us to do it!
I'll remember this, you numbskulls!

I'm so happy to be able to fight alongside Lord Titamon
again... Eee hee hee!
Oh, it's you guys. Not that I wanted to see you.

But, right now, Lord Titamon comes first, so let's call a
temporary ceasefire.
What are they doing?
Minnie... Minerva! Where are you?!
That voice... Is that you, Dianamon?
Minnie! What are you doing in there?!
Urk... It won't open!
This cell is apparently controlled by some kind of mechanism.

It should be around here somewhere. I think they called it
the "Gamma Device."
Got it! I'll find this "Gamma Device" and be right back!
So you are the fugitives?! I will apprehend you myself!
Is that all?!
Where did they go?!
Dianamon, Apollomon, and the Titans, too...?
Oh, well.

My only goal is to apprehend the fugitives. If they are
working together, that makes it easier to catch them.
Those damn kids! How dare they leave me behind!

I think we should work together, kid. I have a pretty good
idea of how to open the cells.

You all want to rescue Minervamon. And naturally,
we want to escape from here, too.

It sounds like the makings of a mutually beneficial
arrangement to me.
So, what do you say? Do we have a deal...?

Okay. First, we need to head to the Gamma Device that
controls the cells. It should be up these stairs.
Let's go, kid.

This is the Gamma Device that controls the cells.
But, it's a bit tricky to use.

In order to operate the Gamma Device, we need to use
two other devices to unlock it first.

I can show you how to get to them. We go over the gangway
bridge. And then, take the west passage from there.

Eh? What're ya starin' at?! I'll break outta this cage before
ya know it!

If only I could get my strength back, I'd break this cage
in no time. Damn. Why do I feel so weak right now?!
I believe we know who we should give the key to this cell to...
Yes, we agree it would be safest in ClavisAngemon's hands.

The gate is open... Wait. What is this...? Why, it is the
escaped prisoners!
Ah, perfect timing! I shall capture you myself!

Apparently, you need a key to open the door here. I heard
they gave it to ClavisAngemon.

All I can do is cheer you on from here, but please don't do
anything reckless, okay? Do you promise?
It seems you need a key to open the cell.
Looks like they're after us. We need to regroup!
You said that ClavisAngemon has the key, right?

I think ClavisAngemon's probably searching for us in the
west wing. Let's head over there now.
Wait! Not that way, ClavisAngemon is there!
There's no time to deal with those damn angels right now!
Ah, I knew you were coming! Prepare yourselves, fugitives!
We found you! This is as far as you go!
Urk! This way's no good, either!
There will be no escape!

At this rate, we'll be surrounded! Take those stairs down
to safety!
It's about time I ended this farce— Hm?

Wait. This is inside the cell... That means that the temple's
protection does not extend...

His movements... He's clearly slowing down. This is our
chance! Let's go!
Ngh...!
Now, kid! Use the device!
Curses...!

Hehe. What a wonderful sight! It won't be moving now! Let's
get going, kid!

Ah, you're back! The other cells have opened, but this
one stayed closed for some reason...

Minnie's cell won't open! Everyone else has gotten out.
Why not Minnie's!?
Well?
The device isn't responding. It seems this isn't the correct key.
I see... It's a fake. Quite the elaborate setup they have here.
In that case... Dianamon!
Okay, it's done. It's all thanks to your efforts back there.

Their security's thinned out considerably. We should be able
to escape on our own now.

We'll settle this someday, kid. Just wait. You'll get what's
coming to you.

*panting* Are there any other angel Digimon around?!
Those punks kept us locked up like that for so damn long...!

They put the problematic Digimon here for "rehabilitation,"
and now we're getting sent to the human world. Damn Junomon!
You! Do you really think you'll get away with all of this?!
Hey! Open this door! Where do you think you're going?!

Blast! It managed to get around behind us somehow. Looks
like we've got no other choice...
W-Wait! Stop! It's me! Hold your attack!
That voice... Lanamon, is that you? It's me, Titamon.
Huh? Lord Titamon?
What are you doing here?

There was some kind of commotion, so I figured I'd use the
opportunity to escape.

But when I transformed into one of the angels wandering around,
everyone started coming up to me and giving reports.

They kept talking about the fugitives' location, or what we're
going to do next.

The real angel finally caught up to me, though, and it was none
too pleased, to say the least.
Yikes! Speaking of which, look who's here!
What terrible timing! I'm all out of power!

How dare you use someone with the ability to transform to confuse
me! I should have known this was all your doing!

Lanamon... Are you really planning on leaving us to deal with
this by ourselves?!

Well, it looks like you've got things pretty much handled here!
Thanks for the help, and I'll see you all later!

How did I know about the devices, you ask? Hmph.
Did you forget that we came here on a raid?

Okay, that should open the cell doors. Let's hurry back
to Minervamon!

I can still move! In the name of Junomon, I refuse to let
you escape!
You never learn, do you?
Stop getting in Lord Titamon's way! Idle Bubble!
Now! Yaaaaaaah!

Looks like I've still got some power left over from
Chronomon's treasure. I've stopped time...!

But the effect won't last long! Quickly! Throw that switch
for the cell!
...Huh?! They put me to sleep again!

Curse you! Time for me to strike back— Huh? Wh-Why am I
trapped in here?!

Hehehehehe... *sigh*
What a wonderful sight!
Well done, kid.
That should keep him. Now, let's get to Minervamon.
Hey, kid! Where are you going?

I can't keep this up for very long. I need you to hurry up
and throw that switch for the cell.
Hm? What's this?
Ngh... Hurry up, already! I can't keep this up forever!

Well, you've been running all over the place, but as you
can see, this cell is still locked up tight.
Seriously, what's with the VIP treatment?
Hee hee... I know all about it!

I was disguised as an angel, so I heard everything. They
really should learn to keep their mouths shut.

You see, this cell is special. The angels referred to it as
"the high-security cell."

It was specifically made to house the most dangerous
offenders—the worst of the worst.

I also heard they raised its security level to the maximum,
due to all the trouble you people have been causing.

Why did they have to go and make a cell you can't even open,
no matter how many people try?!
Well, this just got more complicated. So what do we do now?
I suppose we have no other choice. Dianamon!
We can handle this much ourselves!

After all that, you just smashed the door open in the end?!
But I guess you did live up to your end of the bargain...

Looks like all the commotion you caused has thinned
out the security considerably.

That should give us a chance to escape. So I guess our
little partnership has reached its end.
I won't show you any mercy the next time we meet.
Just you wait... You'll get what's coming to you, kid.

There is nobody in the next cell, right? It was originally
being used to hold Greymon.

They took Greymon away some time ago, though. That is
all I know.
Hey, someone let us out of here! I'm begging you!
At this facility, they take us out one by one and... *shudder*
Waaaaah! S-Someone, help uuuuus!

This cell is the worst. Our power is blocked by that darned
"temple's protection."

If only I could get out of here, I could show them my true
power... How mortifying...

Something called the "temple's protection" is amplifying the
power of some angels, making them stronger than usual.

And they are letting their fake power go to their heads.
How annoying!

Geh geh geh... Did ya see that? I gave those angel
Digimon a good thrashin'!

So you're the one who sprung me, huh? Thanks for that.
I'll be sure to repay the favor if the opportunity ever arises.
We're finally free! We gave those angels quite a beating!

They put us in those cells that block our power because
they're afraid of us!

But as soon as we got out, victory was ours. Hehe! How do
they like that?!
We managed to defeat the angels.

After I got my true power back, the angels were hardly a
challenge.

So you are the ones who opened the prison cell doors?
Thank you so much for the help!

I got my strength back as soon as I got out of that cell.
Taking down those angels was a piece of cake!

I see... So it is quite a difficult procedure to open this
cell, is it...?

Forgive me, but would you mind searching for the device
for me? I cannot leave Nervy here while she is so weak.
I heard that those taken from their cells never return.

I cannot allow anything to happen to Minnie. I must stay
here and stand guard.
Hm? It's finally over? Phew, that sure was scary...
What was with that shark?! It just kept chomping at everyone!
*sigh* This has all been too much for me. I need a rest.
Where're you going, kid? We have to find the Gamma Device.
Do you want to ride the Locomon Railroad?
Yes, please!
Not right now.

The train will pull into the station momentarily. Please
wait until it comes to a complete stop.
We look forward to serving you again.

We heard everything. Lady Junomon is guarding something 
important in this temple and is unable to leave.

People consider the Relic of Iliad to be a great treasure.
That's why there's a barrier in order to keep it safe.

We received permission to travel to the Gear Forest.
Are you ready to go?
I bid you welcome. I am the caretaker of this temple.

Junomon is within. If you have business here, you may
proceed inside.

I'm so jealous of you. I want to visit all kinds of different
places, too!
I bet you must be really tired! But go ahead on in.

The Guardian Palace where Lady Junomon resides
is protected by a special barrier...

As a result, it is only accessible via the Locomon Railroad.
We can journey there now that it's running again.
Are you ready to board?

I connected this gate to the place where Chronomon is. 
However, a space-time distortion has already arisen...

I have tried to eliminate any possible side effects, but it may 
take some time before you emerge on the other side.
Please, if anyone can stop Chronomon, it is you...!
{next}[Enter the gate.]
{end}[Don't enter.]

Observe the state of this world with your own eyes. See just
how dire our need for the Great Guardian has become.

Please proceed to the Abyss Area at once. I beseech you
to return peace to our threatened seas.

With that, Aegiomon, I leave it to you. And you as well,
children of man...

The World Tree is at the center of the Current. You will find
the enemy's forces concentrated there more than ever before.

Please be careful. I shall pray for your safety, Great
Guardian Aegiomon.
What's the matter? Are you okay?! You mustn't give up!
